_comment: Customize the look without touching code. Colors are hex. Positions/margins are in a 1080x1920 frame. Restart nothing — scripts read this on every run.
_font_note: To use another font: drop a .ttf in assets/fonts/, set 'font' to its path and 'font_family' to the font's real family name (what libass matches on).
_max_download_height_note: Cap for YouTube downloads. 1080 is plenty for TikTok/Insta/Shorts (they recompress anyway). Bump to 1440 only if you want sharper face-cam crops (the crop is a vertical slice of the frame, so a taller source = crisper vertical).

safe_zone._note: bottom/right reserve room for TikTok/Reels UI (buttons column on the right, caption+bar at the bottom). Captions/hook are kept inside these margins.
